ideation: This animation sequence simulates the action of holding a steering wheel and driving.  The robot will mimic the motions of a driver gripping and turning the wheel. The sequence emphasizes the hands-on nature of driving. Frame 1 begins with the arms outstretched, palms facing each other, in preparation for gripping an imaginary steering wheel. Frame 2 shows the arms slightly bent, simulating the grip on the wheel.  Frame 3 shows a slight turn of the wheel, with one arm moving more than the other. Frame 4 shows the arms returning to a more neutral position, and the final frame shows the arms relaxed and at rest.  This sequence captures the key moments of driving, avoiding unnecessary intermediate frames.

frames.beat: arms outstretched, ready to grip the wheel
hands grip the wheel, arms slightly bent
turning the wheel left, then right
hands release the wheel, arms relax
arms hang loosely at the sides
